summary: Iteration 43 - Frontend UI Animation Testing Complete. All celebration animations working perfectly. Tested: SIX (golden explosion with 'MAXIMUM!' text), FOUR (blue boundary streak with 'BOUNDARY!' text), WICKET (red flash with flying stumps and 'WICKET!' text), WINNER (gold confetti with 'WINNER!' text). All 4 demo trigger buttons visible on Match Detail page. Celebrations auto-dismiss after 2-3 seconds. Live tab shows AI Commentary with Match Pulse, Phase Analysis, Timeline with event badge glow effects (six-badge-glow, wicket-badge-pulse, four-badge-sweep). Completed matches show winner text with slide animation. Match cards have staggered entrance animations via Framer Motion.
critical_code_review_comments: CelebrationOverlay.jsx: Complete Framer Motion implementation with 4 celebration types (six, four, wicket, prize) - all working correctly
Demo trigger buttons (data-testid=demo-six, demo-four, demo-wicket, demo-prize) visible on Match Detail page line ~313-338
Celebration overlay auto-dismisses after config.duration (2.2s-3.2s depending on type)
AICommentaryTab.jsx: Event badge glow CSS classes (six-badge-glow, wicket-badge-pulse, four-badge-sweep) applied correctly
HomePage.jsx: Match cards wrapped in motion.div with staggered entrance animations (delay: i * 0.06-0.08)
Completed matches show winner text with motion.span slide animation (initial x: -30, animate x: 0)
App.css: All keyframes defined correctly (sixBadgeGlow, wicketBadgePulse, fourSweep, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified all UI animation features. Key verified features: 1) Login flow works (Get Started -> Phone -> PIN -> Admin Dashboard -> Player View). 2) Homepage loads with 10 match cards with staggered entrance animations. 3) Match Detail page shows demo celebration buttons (SIX, FOUR, WICKET, WINNER). 4) All 4 celebration types trigger correctly with proper animations and auto-dismiss. 5) Live tab shows AI Commentary with Match Pulse, Phase Analysis, Timeline (16 moments). 6) Event badge glow effects working (six-badge-glow, wicket-badge-pulse, four-badge-sweep). 7) Completed matches show winner text with slide animation. 8) Hot Contests section shows Instagram Stories style circles.
